overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dense cyberpunk urban environment with Asian architectural influences. The player moves from covered walkways past vending machines, across a sunlit intersection with distinctive external staircases, and into a covered food market area with neon lighting and steam vents.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk past colorful vending machines and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with visible cybernetic implants walking past the camera

bright red and yellow vending machine with 'BURRITO XXL' signage
row of colorful gaming machines with neon lights
green metal railing separating walkway from street

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered urban sidewalk lined with vending machines and arcade games. The walkway is sheltered by an industrial metal roof structure, with a green metal railing separating the path from the adjacent street. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching open intersection with red lanterns

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open urban intersection with bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing along walkway toward the open intersection, passing red paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the intersection exit

entered.detail: traditional red spherical paper lanterns hanging from building facade
white external staircase attached to multi-story concrete building
large concrete building with multiple levels and external stair access

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues with red paper lanterns becoming visible on the left. The covered structure begins to open up as the camera approaches an intersection, revealing a distinctive external staircase on a large concrete building ahead. The lighting transitions from shaded to bright sunlight as the exit approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crossing and multi-story parking structure

events.description: crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at intersection
turning left to follow the sidewalk along the main street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning left to continue along the street

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street with glass sides
white steam rising from street level vent

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright sunlit intersection dominated by a massive concrete parking structure with external stairs on the left. The camera crosses the street with other pedestrians while cars wait, then turns left. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the intersection, and steam vents are visible further down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with steam vents and hanging red lanterns

events.description: approaching covered market entrance with food stalls and entering the shaded area

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing steam vents and approaching the market entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near storefront looking at merchandise

entered.detail: tall digital billboard displaying vehicle advertisements
dark fabric awning covering outdoor food vendor area

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial street with prominent steam vents creating atmospheric effects. Red paper lanterns hang overhead between buildings. The camera approaches a food stall area with a dark canopy, passing a digital advertisement kiosk on the right. The environment transitions from open street to a more enclosed market space.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor food market with stalls and vendors under artificial lighting

events.description: slowing down and stopping at the food vendor counter

agents.ego_description: entering the covered market and approaching the food stall counter where a vendor stands

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing futuristic visor standing behind food counter
customer in yellow shirt browsing items at the stall

entered.detail: metal counter with food preparation area and display cases
industrial metal racks with boxes and supplies

segments.scene_description: The segment moves into a dimly lit indoor food market with artificial lighting. The camera approaches a food vendor counter where a vendor with a futuristic visor stands behind a display case. Metal shelving and cardboard boxes are visible to the left, while a refrigerator unit stands to the right. The atmosphere is enclosed and intimate compared to the bright exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered, industrial walkway into a bright, open urban intersection. It begins along a covered sidewalk lined with vending machines and arcade games, moving past a green metal railing under a heavy industrial roof. As the camera progresses, red paper lanterns appear on the left and the overhead structure begins to open, shifting the lighting from deep shade to brilliant sunlight. The scene then expands into a wide intersection dominated by a massive concrete parking structure with external staircases, where the camera crosses the street amidst pedestrians and waiting cars. Finally, the view turns left toward a distant street featuring an overhead pedestrian bridge and rising steam vents.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling commercial street into the intimate, dimly lit interior of a futuristic food market. It begins by gliding along a street filled with atmospheric steam vents and red paper lanterns hanging between buildings, passing a digital advertisement kiosk on the right. As the camera approaches a food stall area under a dark canopy, the open urban environment gradually transitions into a more enclosed market space. The scene then shifts fully indoors, moving past metal shelving and cardboard boxes toward a food vendor wearing a futuristic visor. Finally, the lighting transforms from the bright exterior to a moody, artificial glow as the camera settles before a vendor's display case and a nearby refrigerator unit.
